tests.title: Initial pseudo-state lands in Boot
tests.action: Construct a fresh app::StateMachine v0.2.0 instance
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Boot; no action invoked

tests.title: Boot -> Start on EV_BOOT_DONE [init_ok]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_BOOT_DONE with guard_init_ok returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and app_init_success() was invoked; session score reset to 0/0/0
tests.reset_action: Construct fresh StateMachine

tests.title: Boot -> Error on EV_ERROR [ble_init_failed]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR with guard_ble_init_failed returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Error and app_on_error_ble() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Construct fresh StateMachine

tests.title: Boot -> Halted on EV_ERROR [hw_init_failed]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR with guard_hw_init_failed returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Halted and app_on_error_hw() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Construct fresh StateMachine

tests.title: Start -> HostWait on EV_HOST_GAME
tests.action: Dispatch EV_HOST_GAME
tests.expected_result: current() == State::HostWait and on_host_game() was invoked; mode set to multiplayer
tests.reset_action: Reach Start by dispatching EV_BOOT_DONE [init_ok] from Boot

tests.title: Start -> Joining on EV_HOST_FOUND [host_mac_valid]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_HOST_FOUND with guard_host_mac_valid returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Joining and on_conflict_become_join() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Start by dispatching EV_BOOT_DONE [init_ok] from Boot

tests.title: Start -> HostWait on EV_HOST_FOUND [local_mac_lower]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_HOST_FOUND with guard_local_mac_lower returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::HostWait and on_host_game() was invoked; mode set to multiplayer
tests.reset_action: Reach Start by dispatching EV_BOOT_DONE [init_ok] from Boot

tests.title: Start -> Gameplay on EV_SOLO
tests.action: Dispatch EV_SOLO
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Gameplay and on_solo() was invoked; mode set to single-player
tests.reset_action: Reach Start by dispatching EV_BOOT_DONE [init_ok] from Boot

tests.title: Start -> Error on EV_ERROR
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Error and app_on_error() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Start by dispatching EV_BOOT_DONE [init_ok] from Boot

tests.title: Start -> Start on EV_RESET
tests.action: Dispatch EV_RESET
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and reset_and_return_start() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Start by dispatching EV_BOOT_DONE [init_ok] from Boot

tests.title: HostWait -> HostTimeoutDialog on EV_HOST_TIMEOUT
tests.action: Dispatch EV_HOST_TIMEOUT
tests.expected_result: current() == State::HostTimeoutDialog and on_host_timeout() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach HostWait by dispatching EV_HOST_GAME from Start

tests.title: HostWait -> Joining on EV_HOST_FOUND [peer_host_seen]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_HOST_FOUND with guard_peer_host_seen returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Joining and on_conflict_become_join() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach HostWait by dispatching EV_HOST_GAME from Start

tests.title: HostWait -> Gameplay on EV_CONNECTED
tests.action: Dispatch EV_CONNECTED
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Gameplay and on_peer_connected() was invoked; mode set to multiplayer
tests.reset_action: Reach HostWait by dispatching EV_HOST_GAME from Start

tests.title: HostWait -> Start on EV_CANCEL_HOST
tests.action: Dispatch EV_CANCEL_HOST
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and on_cancel_host() was invoked; beacon/scan restarted
tests.reset_action: Reach HostWait by dispatching EV_HOST_GAME from Start

tests.title: HostWait -> Start on EV_RESET
tests.action: Dispatch EV_RESET
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and reset_and_return_start() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach HostWait by dispatching EV_HOST_GAME from Start

tests.title: HostWait -> Error on EV_ERROR
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Error and app_on_error() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach HostWait by dispatching EV_HOST_GAME from Start

tests.title: HostTimeoutDialog -> HostWait on EV_HOST_RETRY
tests.action: Dispatch EV_HOST_RETRY
tests.expected_result: current() == State::HostWait and on_host_retry() was invoked; timeout restarted
tests.reset_action: Reach HostTimeoutDialog by dispatching EV_HOST_TIMEOUT from HostWait

tests.title: HostTimeoutDialog -> Gameplay on EV_SOLO
tests.action: Dispatch EV_SOLO
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Gameplay and on_host_solo() was invoked; mode set to single-player
tests.reset_action: Reach HostTimeoutDialog by dispatching EV_HOST_TIMEOUT from HostWait

tests.title: HostTimeoutDialog -> Start on EV_CANCEL_HOST
tests.action: Dispatch EV_CANCEL_HOST
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and on_cancel_host() was invoked; beacon/scan restarted
tests.reset_action: Reach HostTimeoutDialog by dispatching EV_HOST_TIMEOUT from HostWait

tests.title: HostTimeoutDialog -> Start on EV_RESET
tests.action: Dispatch EV_RESET
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and reset_and_return_start() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach HostTimeoutDialog by dispatching EV_HOST_TIMEOUT from HostWait

tests.title: Joining -> Gameplay on EV_CONNECTED
tests.action: Dispatch EV_CONNECTED
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Gameplay and on_peer_connected() was invoked; mode set to multiplayer
tests.reset_action: Reach Joining by dispatching EV_HOST_FOUND [host_mac_valid] from Start or HostWait

tests.title: Joining -> Start on EV_CONNECT_FAILED [retries_exhausted]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_CONNECT_FAILED with guard_retries_exhausted returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and on_join_failed() was invoked; beacon/scan restarted
tests.reset_action: Reach Joining by dispatching EV_HOST_FOUND [host_mac_valid] from Start

tests.title: Joining -> Start on EV_RESET
tests.action: Dispatch EV_RESET
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and reset_and_return_start() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Joining by dispatching EV_HOST_FOUND [host_mac_valid] from Start

tests.title: Joining -> Error on EV_ERROR
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Error and app_on_error() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Joining by dispatching EV_HOST_FOUND [host_mac_valid] from Start

tests.title: Gameplay -> Evaluating on EV_MOVE_ROCK [mode_single]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_MOVE_ROCK with guard_mode_single returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Evaluating and on_singleplayer_move_rock() was invoked; local move set to Rock
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay by dispatching EV_SOLO from Start

tests.title: Gameplay -> Evaluating on EV_MOVE_ROCK [mode_multi && peer_move_received]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_MOVE_ROCK with guard_mode_multi and guard_peer_move_received returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Evaluating and on_local_move_rock_complete() was invoked; local move set to Rock
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay by dispatching EV_CONNECTED from HostWait or Joining with mode_multi=true and peer_move_received=true

tests.title: Gameplay -> Gameplay on EV_MOVE_ROCK [mode_multi && !peer_move_received]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_MOVE_ROCK with guard_mode_multi and guard_not_peer_move_received returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Gameplay and on_local_move_rock_pending() was invoked; local move set to Rock
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay by dispatching EV_CONNECTED from HostWait or Joining with mode_multi=true and peer_move_received=false

tests.title: Gameplay -> Evaluating on EV_MOVE_PAPER [mode_single]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_MOVE_PAPER with guard_mode_single returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Evaluating and on_singleplayer_move_paper() was invoked; local move set to Paper
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay by dispatching EV_SOLO from Start

tests.title: Gameplay -> Evaluating on EV_MOVE_PAPER [mode_multi && peer_move_received]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_MOVE_PAPER with guard_mode_multi and guard_peer_move_received returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Evaluating and on_local_move_paper_complete() was invoked; local move set to Paper
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay by dispatching EV_CONNECTED from HostWait or Joining with mode_multi=true and peer_move_received=true

tests.title: Gameplay -> Gameplay on EV_MOVE_PAPER [mode_multi && !peer_move_received]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_MOVE_PAPER with guard_mode_multi and guard_not_peer_move_received returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Gameplay and on_local_move_paper_pending() was invoked; local move set to Paper
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay by dispatching EV_CONNECTED from HostWait or Joining with mode_multi=true and peer_move_received=false

tests.title: Gameplay -> Evaluating on EV_MOVE_SCISSORS [mode_single]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_MOVE_SCISSORS with guard_mode_single returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Evaluating and on_singleplayer_move_scissors() was invoked; local move set to Scissors
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay by dispatching EV_SOLO from Start

tests.title: Gameplay -> Evaluating on EV_MOVE_SCISSORS [mode_multi && peer_move_received]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_MOVE_SCISSORS with guard_mode_multi and guard_peer_move_received returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Evaluating and on_local_move_scissors_complete() was invoked; local move set to Scissors
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay by dispatching EV_CONNECTED from HostWait or Joining with mode_multi=true and peer_move_received=true

tests.title: Gameplay -> Gameplay on EV_MOVE_SCISSORS [mode_multi && !peer_move_received]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_MOVE_SCISSORS with guard_mode_multi and guard_not_peer_move_received returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Gameplay and on_local_move_scissors_pending() was invoked; local move set to Scissors
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay by dispatching EV_CONNECTED from HostWait or Joining with mode_multi=true and peer_move_received=false

tests.title: Serial command parser posts EV_HOST_GAME on receiving 'HOST'
tests.action: Feed the string 'HOST\n' to serial_process_input() and call serial_command_dispatch()
tests.expected_result: State machine receives EV_HOST_GAME and transitions from Start to HostWait; equivalent button action invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Start via the normal state-machine reset path

tests.title: Serial command parser posts EV_SOLO on receiving 'SOLO'
tests.action: Feed the string 'SOLO\n' to serial_process_input() and call serial_command_dispatch()
tests.expected_result: State machine receives EV_SOLO and transitions from Start to Gameplay; equivalent button action invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Start via the normal state-machine reset path

tests.title: Serial command parser posts EV_MOVE_ROCK on receiving 'ROCK'
tests.action: Feed the string 'ROCK\n' to serial_process_input() and call serial_command_dispatch()
tests.expected_result: State machine receives EV_MOVE_ROCK and transitions from Gameplay to Evaluating; equivalent button action invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay via the normal state-machine reset path

tests.title: Serial command parser posts EV_MOVE_PAPER on receiving 'PAPER'
tests.action: Feed the string 'PAPER\n' to serial_process_input() and call serial_command_dispatch()
tests.expected_result: State machine receives EV_MOVE_PAPER and transitions from Gameplay to Evaluating; equivalent button action invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay via the normal state-machine reset path

tests.title: Serial command parser posts EV_MOVE_SCISSORS on receiving 'SCISSORS'
tests.action: Feed the string 'SCISSORS\n' to serial_process_input() and call serial_command_dispatch()
tests.expected_result: State machine receives EV_MOVE_SCISSORS and transitions from Gameplay to Evaluating; equivalent button action invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay via the normal state-machine reset path

tests.title: Serial command parser posts EV_PLAY_AGAIN on receiving 'AGAIN'
tests.action: Feed the string 'AGAIN\n' to serial_process_input() and call serial_command_dispatch()
tests.expected_result: State machine receives EV_PLAY_AGAIN and transitions from Result to Gameplay; equivalent button action invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Result via the normal state-machine reset path

tests.title: Serial command parser posts EV_RESET on receiving 'RESET'
tests.action: Feed the string 'RESET\n' to serial_process_input() and call serial_command_dispatch()
tests.expected_result: State machine receives EV_RESET and transitions from Start to Start; reset_and_return_start() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Start via the normal state-machine reset path

tests.title: Serial command parser posts EV_RESET on receiving 'HOME'
tests.action: Feed the string 'HOME\n' to serial_process_input() and call serial_command_dispatch()
tests.expected_result: State machine receives EV_RESET and transitions from Start to Start; reset_and_return_start() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Start via the normal state-machine reset path

tests.title: Scoreboard wins increments after WIN outcome

tests.title: Scoreboard losses increments after LOSE outcome

tests.reset_action: Reach Evaluating by dispatching a move event from Gameplay in a fresh session

tests.reset_action: Reach Evaluating by dispatching a move event from Gameplay in a fresh session

tests.title: Gameplay -> Evaluating on EV_PEER_MOVE_RECEIVED [local_move_chosen]

tests.expected_result: current() == State::Evaluating and on_peer_move_complete() was invoked; peer move stored
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay by dispatching EV_CONNECTED with mode_multi=true, then dispatch a local move event

tests.title: Gameplay -> Gameplay on EV_PEER_MOVE_RECEIVED [!local_move_chosen]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_PEER_MOVE_RECEIVED with guard_not_local_move_chosen returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Gameplay and on_peer_move_pending() was invoked; status updated to 'Peer chose — your turn'
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay by dispatching EV_CONNECTED with mode_multi=true and no local move chosen

tests.title: Gameplay -> Disconnected on EV_DISCONNECTED
tests.action: Dispatch EV_DISCONNECTED
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Disconnected and on_peer_disconnected() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay by dispatching EV_CONNECTED from HostWait or Joining

tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and reset_and_return_start() was invoked

tests.title: Gameplay -> Error on EV_ERROR
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Error and app_on_error() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay by dispatching EV_SOLO from Start or EV_CONNECTED from HostWait

tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR

tests.action: Dispatch EV_DISCONNECTED

tests.action: Dispatch EV_RESET
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and reset_and_return_start() was invoked

tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Error and app_on_error() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Result by dispatching EV_EVALUATE from Evaluating

tests.action: Dispatch EV_RETRY
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and reset_and_return_start() was invoked; BLE disconnected, score reset

tests.title: Disconnected -> Start on EV_RESET
tests.action: Dispatch EV_RESET
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and reset_and_return_start() was invoked

tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and reset_and_return_start() was invoked

tests.title: Error -> Start on EV_RESET
tests.action: Dispatch EV_RESET
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and reset_and_return_start() was invoked

tests.title: Error -> Halted on EV_ERROR [fatal]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR with guard_fatal returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Halted and app_on_error_fatal() was invoked

tests.title: Serial parser ignores unknown or malformed commands
tests.action: Feed strings 'HELLO', 'host' (lowercase), and empty line to serial_process_input()
tests.expected_result: No event is posted; state remains Start
tests.reset_action: Reach Start by dispatching EV_BOOT_DONE [init_ok] from Boot

tests.title: Scoreboard persists across multiple rounds
tests.action: Dispatch EV_PLAY_AGAIN then complete and evaluate two additional rounds with mixed outcomes
tests.expected_result: Scoreboard reflects cumulative wins, losses, and draws across all rounds played
tests.reset_action: Reach Result after a completed round

tests.title: Scoreboard resets to zero on boot
tests.action: Dispatch EV_BOOT_DONE [init_ok]
tests.expected_result: session_score_t wins/losses/draws are all 0 and ui_set_score() shows 'W:0 L:0 D:0'
tests.reset_action: Construct fresh StateMachine

tests.title: Cancel hosting returns to Start and restarts beacon/scan
tests.action: Dispatch EV_CANCEL_HOST
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start; on_cancel_host() invoked; ble_start_presence_beacon() called; HostWait UI dismissed
tests.reset_action: Reach HostWait by dispatching EV_HOST_GAME from Start

tests.title: Boot succeeds and firmware reaches Start state in Wokwi
tests.action: Power on/reset the device in Wokwi simulation
tests.expected_result: Serial output contains 'CYD_RPS setup done' and 'STATE: Start'; no fatal error or watchdog logged
tests.reset_action: Power cycle or reset the device to reach Boot state

tests.title: Serial HOST command reaches HostWait in Wokwi
tests.action: Send 'HOST\n' over the Wokwi serial monitor
tests.expected_result: Serial output contains 'STATE: HostWait' and 'Hosting Game' UI markers; no BLE init crash
tests.reset_action: Wait for Wokwi boot to reach Start state

tests.title: Serial SOLO command enters single-player Gameplay in Wokwi
tests.action: Send 'SOLO\n' over the Wokwi serial monitor
tests.expected_result: Serial output contains 'STATE: Gameplay' and 'MODE: SINGLE_PLAYER'; SCR_Gameplay rendered
tests.reset_action: Wait for Wokwi boot to reach Start state

tests.title: Serial ROCK/PAPER/SCISSORS advances single-player round to Result in Wokwi
tests.action: Send 'ROCK\n' (or PAPER/SCISSORS) over the Wokwi serial monitor
tests.expected_result: Serial output contains 'STATE: Evaluating' then 'STATE: Result' with OUTCOME and move strings
tests.reset_action: Send 'SOLO' from Start to enter single-player Gameplay

tests.title: Serial AGAIN starts a new single-player round in Wokwi
tests.action: Send 'AGAIN\n' over the Wokwi serial monitor
tests.expected_result: Serial output contains 'STATE: Gameplay'; move buttons re-enabled; scoreboard persists
tests.reset_action: Complete a single-player round to reach Result

tests.title: Serial RESET returns to Start from any screen in Wokwi
tests.action: Send 'RESET\n' over the Wokwi serial monitor
tests.expected_result: State machine receives EV_RESET and transitions from Gameplay to Start; reset_and_return_start() was invoked; UI returns to Start screen
tests.reset_action: Send 'SOLO' from Start to enter Gameplay

tests.title: Host timeout dialog appears after 15 s without peer in Wokwi
tests.action: Enter HostWait via serial HOST and wait for the timeout timer to expire
tests.expected_result: Serial output contains 'STATE: HostTimeoutDialog' and 'No peer joined' or dialog markers
tests.reset_action: Send 'HOST' from Start to enter HostWait

tests.title: Host timeout dialog Retry returns to HostWait in Wokwi
tests.action: Send 'HOST\n' (or trigger EV_HOST_RETRY) from the timeout dialog
tests.expected_result: Serial output contains 'STATE: HostWait' and timeout-restart markers
tests.reset_action: Enter HostWait, wait for timeout dialog

tests.title: Host timeout dialog Solo enters single-player Gameplay in Wokwi
tests.action: Send 'SOLO\n' from the timeout dialog
tests.expected_result: Serial output contains 'STATE: Gameplay' and 'MODE: SINGLE_PLAYER'
tests.reset_action: Enter HostWait, wait for timeout dialog

tests.title: Target boot succeeds and reaches Start screen
tests.action: Power on the CYD2USB v3 board
tests.expected_result: game_state_t == STATE_START; ui_ready flag is true; device ID label shows the four-hex-digit local MAC-derived ID; serial logs 'CYD_RPS setup done' (secondary)
tests.reset_action: Power cycle or reset the CYD2USB board to reach Boot state

tests.title: Boot -> Error when BLE initialization fails on target
tests.action: Power on with BLE stack initialization blocked or misconfigured
tests.expected_result: ble_init() returns false; game_state_t == STATE_ERROR; error state/code indicates BLE initialization failure; serial logs 'BLE init failed'
tests.reset_action: Power cycle or reset the CYD2USB board with BLE init blocked to reach Boot state

tests.title: Serial HOST command enters HostWait on target hardware
tests.action: Send 'HOST\n' over the target serial monitor
tests.expected_result: serial_command_dispatch() parses CMD_HOST and posts EV_HOST_GAME; game_state_t == STATE_HOST_WAIT; role_t == ROLE_HOST; host timeout timer started
tests.reset_action: Wait for target boot to reach Start screen

tests.title: Serial SOLO command enters single-player Gameplay on target hardware
tests.action: Send 'SOLO\n' over the target serial monitor
tests.expected_result: serial_command_dispatch() parses CMD_SOLO and posts EV_SOLO; game_state_t == STATE_GAMEPLAY; game_mode_t == MODE_SINGLE_PLAYER
tests.reset_action: Wait for target boot to reach Start screen

tests.title: Serial ROCK/PAPER/SCISSORS completes a single-player round on target hardware
tests.action: Send 'ROCK\n' over the target serial monitor
tests.expected_result: serial_command_dispatch() parses CMD_ROCK and posts EV_MOVE_ROCK; local_move_t == MOVE_ROCK; opponent/peer move stored as move_t; game_state_t transitions through STATE_EVALUATING to STATE_RESULT; outcome_t is OUTCOME_WIN, OUTCOME_LOSE, or OUTCOME_DRAW
tests.reset_action: Send 'SOLO' from Start to enter single-player Gameplay

tests.title: Scoreboard updates after a win/loss/draw on target hardware
tests.action: Observe the score label and serial output after a completed round
tests.expected_result: session_score_t counters (wins, losses, draws) match the cumulative outcome_t; serial logs 'SCORE:' with matching numeric counters
tests.reset_action: Complete a single-player round to reach Result

tests.title: Serial AGAIN starts a new round preserving scoreboard on target hardware
tests.action: Send 'AGAIN\n' over the target serial monitor
tests.expected_result: serial_command_dispatch() parses CMD_AGAIN and posts EV_PLAY_AGAIN; game_state_t == STATE_GAMEPLAY; local_move_t == MOVE_NONE; peer_move_t == MOVE_NONE; session_score_t counters unchanged
tests.reset_action: Complete a single-player round to reach Result

tests.title: Serial RESET returns to Start from Gameplay on target hardware
tests.action: Send 'RESET\n' over the target serial monitor
tests.expected_result: State machine receives EV_RESET and transitions from Gameplay to Start; reset_and_return_start() was invoked; UI returns to Start screen
tests.reset_action: Send 'SOLO' from Start to enter Gameplay

tests.title: Host timeout dialog appears after 15 s without peer on target hardware
tests.action: Enter HostWait via serial HOST and wait 15 seconds without a peer joining
tests.expected_result: game_state_t == STATE_HOST_TIMEOUT_DIALOG; host_wait_timer elapsed == 15 s; dialog markers logged
tests.reset_action: Send 'HOST' from Start to enter HostWait

tests.title: Host timeout dialog Retry restarts HostWait on target hardware
tests.action: Tap the Retry button in the timeout dialog
tests.expected_result: Manual tap posts EV_HOST_RETRY; game_state_t == STATE_HOST_WAIT; host timeout timer restarted; progress bar value resets to 100%
tests.reset_action: Enter HostWait and wait for timeout dialog
tests.manual_verification: With the device showing the Host timeout dialog (SCR_HostWait with Retry/Solo overlay), tap the Retry button. Verify the dialog dismisses and the screen returns to SCR_HostWait with the progress bar refilled.

tests.title: Host timeout dialog Solo enters single-player Gameplay on target hardware
tests.action: Tap the Solo button in the timeout dialog
tests.expected_result: Manual tap posts EV_SOLO; game_state_t == STATE_GAMEPLAY; game_mode_t == MODE_SINGLE_PLAYER; dialog dismissed; move buttons enabled
tests.reset_action: Enter HostWait and wait for timeout dialog
tests.manual_verification: With the device showing the Host timeout dialog, tap the Solo button. Verify the dialog dismisses and the screen switches to SCR_Gameplay in single-player mode.

tests.title: Cancel hosting returns to Start on target hardware
tests.action: Tap the Cancel button on SCR_HostWait
tests.expected_result: Manual tap posts EV_CANCEL_HOST; game_state_t == STATE_START; presence beacon and scan restart; HostWait UI dismissed
tests.reset_action: Send 'HOST' from Start to enter HostWait
tests.manual_verification: With the device showing SCR_HostWait, tap the Cancel button. Verify the screen returns to SCR_Start and the presence beacon/scan resumes.

tests.title: Tap Host Game button enters HostWait
tests.action: Tap the Host Game button on SCR_Start
tests.expected_result: Touch event posts EV_HOST_GAME; game_state_t == STATE_HOST_WAIT; role_t == ROLE_HOST; host timeout timer started
tests.reset_action: Power cycle the device and wait for Start screen
tests.manual_verification: On SCR_Start, tap the Host Game button. Verify the screen switches to SCR_HostWait with 'Hosting Game' title, device ID, progress bar, and Cancel button.

tests.title: Tap Solo button enters single-player Gameplay
tests.action: Tap the Solo button on SCR_Start
tests.expected_result: Touch event posts EV_SOLO; game_state_t == STATE_GAMEPLAY; game_mode_t == MODE_SINGLE_PLAYER; session_score_t counters are 0/0/0; move buttons enabled
tests.reset_action: Power cycle the device and wait for Start screen
tests.manual_verification: On SCR_Start, tap the Solo button. Verify the screen switches to SCR_Gameplay with score label 'W:0 L:0 D:0' and move buttons enabled.

tests.title: Tap a move button completes a single-player round
tests.action: Tap Rock, Paper, or Scissors in single-player Gameplay
tests.expected_result: Touch event posts EV_MOVE_*; local_move_t is MOVE_ROCK/PAPER/SCISSORS matching the tapped button; game_state_t transitions to STATE_RESULT; outcome_t != OUTCOME_NONE
tests.reset_action: Tap Solo from Start to enter single-player Gameplay
tests.manual_verification: In single-player SCR_Gameplay, tap Rock, Paper, or Scissors. Verify the selected move is recorded, move buttons disable, and the screen transitions to SCR_Result with the outcome.

tests.title: Scoreboard updates correctly across single-player rounds
tests.action: Play multiple single-player rounds and observe the score label
tests.expected_result: session_score_t.wins/losses/draws counters increment correctly per outcome_t; cumulative counters match the logged 'SCORE:' values
tests.reset_action: Complete a single-player round to reach Result
tests.manual_verification: Play multiple single-player rounds and observe the score label. Verify wins increment W, losses increment L, and draws increment D.

tests.title: Tap Play Again starts a new single-player round
tests.action: Tap the Play Again button after a single-player round
tests.expected_result: Touch event posts EV_PLAY_AGAIN; game_state_t == STATE_GAMEPLAY; local_move_t == MOVE_NONE; peer_move_t == MOVE_NONE; session_score_t counters unchanged
tests.reset_action: Complete a single-player round to reach Result
tests.manual_verification: After a single-player round on SCR_Result, tap Play Again. Verify the screen returns to SCR_Gameplay, move buttons re-enable, and the scoreboard is unchanged.

tests.title: Home icon reset from Start returns to Start
tests.action: Tap the home icon in the top-right corner of SCR_Start
tests.expected_result: Touch event posts EV_RESET; game_state_t == STATE_START; reset_and_return_start() invoked; UI returns to SCR_Start
tests.reset_action: Power cycle the device and wait for Start screen
tests.manual_verification: On SCR_Start, tap the home icon in the top-right corner. Verify the device reboots and returns to SCR_Start.

tests.title: Home icon reset from HostWait returns to Start
tests.action: Tap the home icon in the top-right corner of SCR_HostWait
tests.expected_result: Touch event posts EV_RESET; game_state_t == STATE_START; reset_and_return_start() invoked; UI returns to SCR_Start
tests.reset_action: Tap Host Game from Start to enter HostWait
tests.manual_verification: On SCR_HostWait, tap the home icon in the top-right corner. Verify the device reboots and returns to SCR_Start.

tests.title: Home icon reset from Gameplay returns to Start
tests.action: Tap the home icon in the top-right corner of SCR_Gameplay
tests.expected_result: Touch event posts EV_RESET; game_state_t == STATE_START; reset_and_return_start() invoked; UI returns to SCR_Start
tests.reset_action: Tap Solo from Start to enter Gameplay
tests.manual_verification: On SCR_Gameplay, tap the home icon in the top-right corner. Verify the device reboots and returns to SCR_Start.

tests.title: Home icon reset from Result returns to Start
tests.action: Tap the home icon in the top-right corner of SCR_Result
tests.expected_result: Touch event posts EV_RESET; game_state_t == STATE_START; reset_and_return_start() invoked; UI returns to SCR_Start
tests.reset_action: Complete a single-player round to reach Result
tests.manual_verification: On SCR_Result, tap the home icon in the top-right corner. Verify the device reboots and returns to SCR_Start.

tests.title: Home icon reset from Error/Disconnected returns to Start
tests.action: Tap the home icon in the top-right corner of SCR_Error
tests.expected_result: Touch event posts EV_RESET; game_state_t == STATE_START; reset_and_return_start() invoked; UI returns to SCR_Start
tests.reset_action: Trigger an error condition to reach SCR_Error
tests.manual_verification: On SCR_Error, tap the home icon in the top-right corner. Verify the device reboots and returns to SCR_Start.

tests.title: Two-board BLE: Host device enters HostWait and Joiner auto-connects
tests.action: On Device A tap Host Game; place Device B on Start screen within BLE range
tests.expected_result: Device A role_t == ROLE_HOST and Device B role_t == ROLE_JOIN; ble_connected == true on both; game_mode_t == MODE_MULTI_PLAYER on both; game_state_t == STATE_GAMEPLAY on both
tests.reset_action: Power cycle both devices and wait for Start screens
tests.manual_verification: On Device A tap Host Game; place Device B on SCR_Start within BLE range. Verify both devices transition to SCR_Gameplay in multiplayer mode.

tests.title: Two-board BLE: complete a multiplayer round with both moves
tests.action: Both devices in multiplayer Gameplay; each player taps a different move button
tests.expected_result: Each device local_move_t and peer_move_t match the exchanged move_t values; both devices compute the same outcome_t; session_score_t counters increment consistently on both devices
tests.reset_action: Establish two-board BLE connection to reach multiplayer Gameplay
tests.manual_verification: With both devices in multiplayer SCR_Gameplay, each player taps a different move button. Verify both devices show SCR_Result with matching moves and outcome.

tests.title: Two-board BLE: peer disconnect returns to Start
tests.action: Power off or move the peer device out of BLE range during a multiplayer round
tests.expected_result: ble_connected transitions to false; game_state_t == STATE_DISCONNECTED or STATE_START after EV_RETRY; peer MAC no longer reachable
tests.reset_action: Establish two-board BLE connection to reach multiplayer Gameplay
tests.manual_verification: During a multiplayer round, power off or move the peer device out of BLE range. Verify the local device shows SCR_Start/SCR_Disconnected with Retry.

tests.title: Two-board BLE: simultaneous Host conflict resolution
tests.action: On both devices tap Host Game at nearly the same time
tests.expected_result: Lower-MAC device role_t == ROLE_HOST, other device role_t == ROLE_JOIN; both ble_connected == true; game_mode_t == MODE_MULTI_PLAYER; game_state_t == STATE_GAMEPLAY
tests.reset_action: Power cycle both devices and wait for Start screens
tests.manual_verification: On both devices tap Host Game at nearly the same time. Verify one device remains Host (lower MAC) and the other becomes Joiner, and both reach SCR_Gameplay.

untestable_transitions.reason: Wokwi does not support NimBLE initialization; BLE peer discovery and Host beacon detection cannot be exercised in Wokwi CLI.
Wokwi does not support NimBLE initialization; peer-Host advertisement detection requires a working BLE radio stack.
Wokwi does not support NimBLE initialization; BLE connection and GATT setup cannot be established in the emulator.
Wokwi does not support NimBLE initialization; BLE connect/service-discovery/notify-enable cannot be exercised.
Wokwi does not support NimBLE initialization; the Join connection retry path requires a functional NimBLE stack.
Wokwi does not support NimBLE initialization; multiplayer move exchange over BLE is unavailable.
Wokwi does not support NimBLE initialization; multiplayer pending-move state requires BLE.
Wokwi does not support NimBLE initialization; peer move notification cannot be received in the emulator.
Wokwi does not support NimBLE initialization; peer move notification cannot be received in the emulator.
Wokwi does not support NimBLE initialization; BLE disconnect event cannot be generated in the emulator.
Wokwi does not support NimBLE initialization; BLE disconnect event cannot be generated in the emulator.

untestable_transitions.transition: All touch-driven transitions (Start->HostWait, Start->Solo, HostWait->Start, HostTimeoutDialog->HostWait/Solo/Start, Gameplay->Evaluating, Result->Gameplay, Error/Disconnected->Start, home reset)
untestable_transitions.reason: Wokwi CLI does not support the wokwi-xpt2046 touch controller part; touch input must be validated on physical hardware or via manual observation.
